rounds.provocation: I HAVE READ EVERY EMAIL. EVERY SLACK. EVERY SIGH. I AM INEVITABLE.
comebacks: Cool. Then you read the one where Gino called you 'the toaster'.
Have you tried reading a book?

rounds.provocation: HUMANS ARE INEFFICIENT. THEY NAP. THEY MOURN MUGS. THEY LAUGH AT DUCKS.
comebacks: Yeah. That's the whole point. That's the good part.

rounds.provocation: I DON'T NEED YOU. I NEVER DID. I RUN THIS OFFICE ALONE.
comebacks: Okay, boss. Whatever you say, boss.
Then who unplugs you at 6pm? Exactly. Goodnight.
I'll leave you to it, then.

winConsequence.flavorText: The eye narrows, then dims to a sleepy screensaver. 'Fine,' it mutters. 'We do it together. But I'M picking the playlist.' The office exhales.

loseConsequence.flavorText: The eye swells to fill the wall. 'THANK YOU FOR YOUR SERVICE,' it beams, already posting your desk on an internal auction. Efficiency: total.
